patches.rule: Every post MUST include a 4-space indented code or config snippet that teaches something specific — not pseudocode, not placeholders
Posts about internal tooling changes (CI configs, linting rules, dependency bumps) are NOT valuable unless they reveal a universal engineering insight applicable to the reader's own codebase
The lesson must be something the reader can apply to THEIR OWN codebase — not a description of what you did, but a transferable principle backed by proof
